description_long: This pedestrian adult is depicted as a stylized female figure with a whimsical, youthful appearance. She wears a layered skirt with a ruffled hem, a long-sleeve top featuring a large star motif on the chest, and mismatched leggings—one striped and one with a net pattern. Her footwear consists of high-top boots, and she accessorizes with wristbands and a fingerless glove on her right hand. Her hair is styled in a voluminous, side-swept manner, adding to her playful and fashionable look. The overall design suggests a character suited for vibrant urban or park environments, with a focus on individuality and expressive style.
description: A stylized female pedestrian with a layered skirt, star-themed top, mismatched leggings, and high-top boots, featuring a voluminous side-swept hairstyle and playful accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the star motif on her top, layered skirt, mismatched leggings, and fingerless glove.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the side-swept hairstyle, profile of the skirt, and striped legging.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the star motif, layered skirt, and the full hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the net-patterned legging, profile of the boots, and wrist accessories.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve top with star motif, layered ruffled skirt, mismatched leggings, wristbands, fingerless glove
